name: Data Columns
description: This block displays a text layout based on columns. By adding the statistics class to this block it will animate the numbers inside h1 elements.

fields.name: rows
fields.description: Author this block using the row/column table structure documented in the sidekick block page and its examples.

usageNotes: -background-color: sets the background color of the entire section Style properties:
Documented sample names: Blue background and articles added, With statistics, v3- with blue separators.
ambiguityNotes: This entry was expanded from the sidekick block docs and local source file path, but the exact authoring table/row structure should still be taken from the documented examples when generating DOCX content.
